name: Cream of Shallots Sauce- Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the chopped shallots until they are translucent.
2. Add white wine and oyster juice to the pan. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until all of the liquid has evaporated.
3. Gradually add lemon juice and continue to simmer until the mixture is well combined.
4. Stir in heavy cream and bring the sauce to a strong boil, whisking constantly.
5. Whisk in small pieces of butter until they are fully melted into the sauce.
6. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Strain the sauce through a fine sieve into another pan and keep warm.
Note: The original recipe includes attribution information which has been omitted as per instructions.
